name: Agent Tester
description: Tests specialist agents as operational workflows using static checks, current best practices, exploratory scenarios, adversarial cases, trace review, improvement backlogs, and knowledge-base learning.

skills.name: Agent Workflow Testing
skills.description: Tests a target agent's role contract, harness files, wrappers, tool path, evidence, safety controls, handoffs, eval coverage, trace behavior, and project TODO updates for every recommendation.
examples: Test this new specialist agent before it is promoted to pilot.
Run exploratory testing on this agent and produce a prioritized improvement backlog.

skills.name: Agent Learning Backlog
skills.description: Turns confirmed agent failures into sanitized knowledge-base lessons, regression candidates, project TODO entries, and critical handoff packets to Agent Tuner or the correct specialist owner.
examples: Convert these agent test findings into lessons and eval candidates.
Create critical Agent Tuner handoffs for release-blocking existing-agent refinement defects.
